strategy.name: BTC Weekly Composite — Public Trader Consensus
strategy.notes: Consensus from 5 top public traders. Weekly closes are the only clean signal — ignore intraday wicks. All 3 MAs are combined in one Pine Script overlay to stay within the free-plan 3-indicator limit.

indicators.ma_stack_pine: Single Pine Script overlay: EMA 21 (green) + EMA 50 (purple) + SMA 200 (black). Counts as 1 indicator slot.
indicators.rsi_14: RSI 14 weekly. Used for divergence and overbought/oversold extremes.
indicators.macd_12_26_9: MACD 12/26/9 weekly. Primary momentum direction and divergence confirmation.

bullish: Strong bull: all three MAs in order — EMA 21 > EMA 50 > SMA 200
bearish: EMA 50 acting as resistance on retest
Strong bear: weekly close below SMA 200 AND bounce fails to reclaim it
neutral: MACD histogram near zero with no divergence

long: Weekly candle wicks below EMA 21 or EMA 50 but CLOSES above it (deviation + recovery)
MACD showing bullish divergence (price lower low, MACD higher low)
Confirmation: volume spike on the wick candle + following candle closes above EMA 21
Note (Rekt Capital): after daily RSI prints sub-28, actual price low is 0.32–8.44% lower — wait for price structure, don't chase the RSI print
short_or_reduce: Weekly close below EMA 50 after being above it
Failed retest of EMA 50 as new resistance
MACD line crosses below signal line on weekly
Strongest setup: bearish MACD divergence + RSI above 70 turning down + price fails retest of EMA 50

exit_rules.long_exit_stop: Weekly close below EMA 50 — invalidation per Tone Vays and Rekt Capital
long_exit_target_signals: RSI 14 reaches 75–80 on weekly and begins diverging downward
MACD histogram peaks and turns negative while price still rising (bearish divergence)
Price crosses prior all-time high AND crosses the 200-week SMA from below — Cowen cycle top signal
short_exit_target_signals: MACD bullish divergence (price lower low, MACD higher low)
Price touches EMA 200 weekly as historical support

cycle_phase_model.accumulation: Price near or below SMA 200, RSI sub-40, MACD flat or turning up
cycle_phase_model.bull_run: Price above EMA 21 + EMA 50 + SMA 200 in sequence, RSI 50–75, MACD positive
cycle_phase_model.distribution: RSI above 75 weekly, price above prior ATH + crosses 200w SMA, MACD bearish divergence
cycle_phase_model.bear: Price below EMA 50, SMA 200 acting as resistance, RSI below 45, MACD negative

risk_rules: Weekly close is the signal — never react to intraday wicks
Stop loss: weekly close below EMA 50 from a long position
Do not chase RSI prints — wait for price structure to confirm
